title: edge-ai intent envelope
description: Output contract for any edge-ai backend. The AI may ONLY express these typed, bounded verbs; safety comes from the ABSENCE of dangerous verbs, not a permission fence. edge-reconciler re-validates every field below this.

action.description: block_src->ai_block(drop); ratelimit_src->ai_ratelimit; tarpit_src->ai_tarpit; propose_base_change->human review queue (NEVER auto-applied)

cidr.description: IPv4 or IPv6 host or network (v4 prefix >= /24, v6 prefix >= /64; edge-reconciler re-validates the floor per family). Required for block/ratelimit/tarpit; ignored for propose_base_change.

description.description: for propose_base_change: the human-review suggestion text
